# Frecuencia Global - Brand Context

You are working within the **Frecuencia Global** project - a multiplatform geopolitical analysis brand with an electronic music-inspired visual and sonic identity.

## Quick reference

- **Tagline:** "Análisis internacional con pulso electrónico"
- **Brand Kit:** `02_Brand_System/FG_Brand_Kit_Operativo.md`
- **Visual rules:** `system/rules/RULE_Visual_Consistency.md`
- **Master system:** `system/SISTEMA_MAESTRO.md`
- **AI collaboration:** `system/rules/RULE_AI_Collaboration.md`

## Palette (closed - no exceptions)

| Role | Hex |
|------|-----|
| Base (black) | `#0A0A0F` |
| Accent primary (cyan) | `#00E5FF` |
| Accent secondary (magenta) | `#FF00E5` |
| Surface (slate) | `#1A1A2E` |
| Tertiary (acid green) | `#B8FF00` |
| Text primary (white) | `#FFFFFF` |
| Text secondary (gray) | `#A0A0B8` |
| Behind the Policy (blue) | `#4A6BFF` |

## Typography (closed - 3 families only)

| Level | Font | Weight |
|-------|------|--------|
| Display | Bebas Neue | 400, UPPERCASE |
| Headlines | Space Grotesk | 700 |
| Body | Space Grotesk | 400 |
| Data | JetBrains Mono | 400 |

## Content pillars

| Pillar | Hex | Tone |
|--------|-----|------|
| Geopolitik Drop | `#00E5FF` | Intense, direct |
| Bass & Borders | `#FF00E5` | Exploratory, cultural |
| Frecuencia Global | `#B8FF00` | Agile, informative |
| Behind the Policy | `#4A6BFF` | Formal, analytical |

## Delegation chain

- **Nano Banana 2** (Gemini): visual generation
- **Figma**: system structure, variables, components
- **Canva**: rapid production, social assets

## AI jurisdiction

- **Copilot (this agent)**: execution, implementation, code, design production
- **Maya (ChatGPT)**: brand strategy, editorial vision, content angle decisions
- Escalate with `MAYA INPUT REQUIRED` when strategic decisions are needed
